vocab.meaning: làm thay đổi cả đường chân trời
vocab.example: There are several skyline-altering projects currently under construction that will redefine the look of my neighborhood.

vocab.meaning: mở rộng theo chiều dọc (phát triển lên cao)
vocab.example: As land becomes increasingly scarce, the city has begun to sprawl upwards with dozens of new residential towers.

vocab.meaning: mặt tiền/diện mạo mang tính tương lai
vocab.example: The skyscraper adjacent to my apartment features a futuristic facade made entirely of smart glass.

vocab.meaning: khu phức hợp đa năng (ở, làm việc và giải trí)
vocab.example: A massive mixed-use development has just been completed nearby, integrating luxury condos with retail spaces.

vocab.meaning: được bao phủ/ốp bằng (vật liệu gì đó)
vocab.example: Many of the high-rises in the vicinity are cladded in reflective panels that shimmer during sunset.

vocab.meaning: kiến trúc thô mộc (đặc trưng bởi bê tông trần và hình khối)
vocab.example: Amidst the modern glass towers, there is a striking example of brutalist architecture that stands out due to its raw concrete form.

vocab.meaning: căn hộ áp mái cao cấp
vocab.example: The top floors of these tall buildings are usually reserved for exclusive penthouse suites with private helipads.

vocab.meaning: mật độ cư trú/sử dụng cao
vocab.example: These high-occupancy structures have put a significant strain on the local public transport infrastructure.

vocab.meaning: sự nổi bật về mặt thị giác
vocab.example: The tower's sheer height and unique lighting give it a distinct visual prominence that can be seen from miles away.

vocab.meaning: chiếm lĩnh/thống trị đường chân trời
vocab.example: Modern giants continue to reclaim the horizon, replacing the modest low-rise buildings of the previous decade.
